hero.desc: Venus Gecko: Your Precious Companion. We focus on the wonder of life rather than artificial splendor.

about.title:
Precious Companion,
Beyond Value
about.desc: Venus Gecko is more than just a breeder; we propose a proper companion lifestyle. Meet the premium geckos that will be with you for a lifetime.
about.gem_desc: We define geckos not as mere exotic animals, but as your special 'companion family'. Experience the wonderful connection the moment your eyes meet.

item1.title: Pure Quality
item1.desc: We showcase only top-tier morphs that have undergone strict selection processes.

item2.title: Artistic Care
item2.desc: We maintain the best condition in a delicate environment, treating them like family.

item3.title: Premium Trust
item3.desc: We promise continuous management and communication even after adoption.

gallery.title: Signature Line
gallery.desc: Explore our rare and exclusive lineup of geckos.

location.title: Visit Our Store
location.desc: Experience the Venus Gecko showroom filled with precious companions. Meet geckos waiting for their new family, cared for in the finest environment.

footer.desc:
Delivering value beyond precious companions.
A premium gecko brand proposing a new companion culture.
footer.copy: © 2026 Venus Gecko. All Rights Reserved. Crafted for Excellency.
